title: Music Charts
description: Personal music charts from 20 years of listening data. Heart Top 100 vs. algorithmic inflation, decade charts styled to their era, yearly rankings, and newcomer discoveries.
license_notes: Fonts self-hosted (SIL Open Font License): Anton, Oswald, Bebas Neue, Playfair Display, Press Start 2P, Inter, DM Sans. Data from personal Spotify export, ListenBrainz, and MusicBrainz (CC0).
